name: Mansion #21
description: Al-Baldah, 'The City,' ruled by Saturn in its most beneficial aspect, represents civilization, order, and healing. Particularly favorable for medical treatments and establishing stable communities. Stars in the heart of Sagittarius represent the cosmic city where order prevails and medicine flourishes. The artwork renders this celestial city in Saturn's structured indigo-silver palette with orderly geometric architecture representing civilization's healing power and communal harmony.

attributes.value: Medical treatments, healing, building communities, establishing order
